title: Section 30A
content: 1[30A. Application of 2[section 19].--The provisions of sections 19 and 19A shall, with any necessary adaptations and modifications, apply in relation to a licence under section 30 as they apply in relation to assignment of copyright in a work.]
footnote: 1. Ins. by Act 38 of 1994, s. 10 (w.e.f. 10-5-1995). 2. Subs. by Act 27 of 2012, s. 15, for "section 19 and 19A" (w.e.f. 21-6-2012).
